title: Pouvoirs de signature de la Nouvelle-Zélande

pages.text:
WHEREAS the Government of New Zealand is a party to the International Agreement modifying the International Convention of 21 June 1920 for the Establishment of an International Institute of Refrigeration, signed on 31 May 1937

AND WHEREAS New Zealand 1s by virtue of the said Agreement a Member Country of the

International Institute of Refrigeration

AND WHEREAS it has been deemed necessary that a new international agreement should be established to replace the International Convention of 21 June 1920 and the International Agreement of 31 May 1937 in relations between the Member Countries

AND WHEREAS the Executive Committee of the

International Institute of Refrigeration has for that purpose drawn up and approved an Agreement concerning the International Institute of

Refrigeration

AND WHEREAS that Agreement is now open for signature on behalf of Member Countries

AND WHEREAS It is expedient that a fit person should be invested with Full Powers to sign the

Agreement, in accordance with its provisions, for the Government of New Zealand

I, THOMAS LACHLAN MACDONALD, Minister of

External Affairs of New Zealand, hereby certify that Miss JANE ROBERTSON MCKENZIE C.B.E., Charge d'Affaires of New Zealand in France, 1s by these presents named, constituted and appointed to sign the said Agreement on behalf of the Government of

New Zealand

2.

And I further certify that the Convention when signed will, subject to ratification by the Government of New sealand, be acknowledged by the Government of

New Zealand in the fullest manner.

In witness whereof I have signed these presents and have affixed hereto the seal of the Minister of

External Affairs of New Zealand.

signed and sealed at Wellington this twelflh 1955.

day of May

Minister of External Affairó of New Zealand

a man
